reviews.review_description:
I upgraded to premium thinking there would be more tracks and that the 300 category would be playable in championship mode but nope.
They also want to charge extra for new tracks which is normal nowadays but unacceptable for me, specially after I just purchased the "full game"

The game is super fun but what you purchase by upgrading should be clearer.

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for the review and feedback!

I'm taking your feedback straight to the team so we can update the descriptions and ensure no one else feels misled. :)

reviews.review_description: DO NOT PAY TO UPGRADE. Enjoyed the free version so paid to upgrade,. Now it doesn't always open up the paid content. Reinstalled a few times and still the same thing. It's a good game, maybe the best racer on quest, but buy the separate full version if you wish to purchase and don't upgrade through this.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the high praise on the racing itself, but I'm incredibly sorry to hear you're running into this bug with the in-app purchase upgrade. Getting locked out of content you paid for is completely unacceptable, and we appreciate you sharing the workaround about buying the standalone full version instead. We will definitely look into this licensing/unlock issue immediately to find out why the upgrade isn't consistently registering after reinstallation.

reviews.review_description: This game is pretty realistic so i recommend playing this for a few hours before buying the full game. Don't get carried away by the negative Reviews this game takes dedication and skill and most people don't stay around long enough to see that. Enjoy the game and have fun kicking me off the leaderboard :)

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the amazing review! :D

reviews.review_description: Absolutely fun to play, would recommend use of both hands ie twist the throttle on the right and trigger the break, on the left, also wish the player had a body, with visible limbs, this would better help orient yourself when riding, also maybe a few more riders added to the grid, (ability to add more than ten riders to any race) would be amazing, otherwise an amazing game

developer_response.body: Hey Brian, thanks a lot for the suggestions - we'll forward them to our developer team.

reviews.review_description: Why when you turn a corner is the bike not even under you it's off to the side and you are just a floating head in the air. That's what everyone I have spoken to about this game says also. Plus it's just a bike with no rider. Doesn't feel immersive at all. Add more control scheme options. I don't understand why you guys have not done it yet. I would buy the full game if it actually played well. And the bike had a rider. Which was me. Not just a head.

developer_response.body: I appreciate the feedback. The camera lean during cornering was designed to mimic racing physics and reduce motion sickness, but I completely understand how it can break immersion and make you feel like a floating head. Modeling a full rider body and adding more control schemes are complex challenges for a small team, but your points about immersion and customization are totally valid. We'll definitely look into this as we plan out future updates!

reviews.review_description: I have a Connect version. It's a great simulator, quite realistic! I want purchase full version, but code for discount for upgrade to Premium don't work :(
So i want to play this game it looks very fun but. Im stuck at the hot lap practice so please fix it
Some of my friends weren't able to purchase the full game but now we can all play together!

developer_response.body: Yep, that is the best part! Thank you for the review EEFC. <3
Thanks for the feedback and the review, much appreciated! <3
Thanks for the feedback and the review, much appreciated! <3

reviews.review_description: Cant even load in without it kicking me

developer_response.body: Hey floridaboy, this looks like a Meta related issue - could you please try removing the app cache or redownloading the app? Thank you!
